object-entries.description: This writing agent adapts a given text to fit any tone you specify as input.
This writing agent acts as an expert linguistic editor, correcting grammar and spelling errors while strictly preserving your original tone and style.
This writing agent improves text eliminating wordiness and passive voice to deliver a clear, direct message.
This agent provides targeted support by searching the Liferay DXP instance for the most relevant data, ensuring every response is grounded in your specific environment.
This writing agent takes a given text and expands it into a longer, more detailed version.
This writing agent takes your text and rewrites it to be briefer and easier to read.
